top_signals.title: US Airline Stocks Erase Pandemic-Era Losses as Oil Prices Ease
top_signals.summary: A popular gauge of the US airline industry has finally recovered from pandemic-era losses after six years, as progress on a peace deal between US and Iran pushed oil prices lower and eased the pressure on carriers’ profitability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Most Stocks Rise on Signs Economy Is in Good Shape: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders lifted most stocks as signs the world’s largest economy remains solid despite elevated inflation bolstered bets that Corporate America’s earnings will keep powering ahead.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Quant fund says bitcoin is near a major inflection point as rare onchain signals align
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Tequila, Trucking, and the Future of the Border
top_signals.summary:
Reliance Partners acquired Borderless Coverage in 2021, and the Modernization of Cross Border event has grown each year alongside this acquisition.

The post Tequila, Trucking, and the Future of the Border appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
